ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Classification label for the patient's condition */,
  "hemoglobin" REAL /* Hemoglobin level of the patient */,
  "glucose" REAL /* Glucose level of the patient */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color coding for the patient's condition */,
  "distance_from_alice" REAL /* Distance from Alice (a reference point for disease classification) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure of the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was diagnosed */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment the patient is receiving */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* A brief medical history of the patient */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* The status of the patient's consent for data usage */,
  "data_access_log" INTEGER /* Reference to the access logs for the patient's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_data_access_log FOREIGN KEY ("data_access_log") REFERENCES access_logs ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the classification model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "validation_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the validation set */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the test set */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to train the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model the trained model belongs to */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to train the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training process */,
  "training_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics like precision, recall, F1-score, etc. */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the result belongs to */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model used */,
  "predicted_class" INTEGER /* Predicted class label for the patient */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis */,
  "analysis_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the analysis */,
  "analysis_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics like precision, recall, F1-score, etc. */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., PI, researcher, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the researcher (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the researcher logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device from which the access was made (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the access (e.g., research, review, audit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
